Class ManagementService

java.lang.Object
martin.viewtool.core.ManagementService
public class ManagementService extends Object
Service that handles operations on media files: listing, deleting, downloading from the network, uploading, and opening locally.
Author:
cesar

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ManagementService(LibraryService lib, MediaService media, PreferencesService prefs)
    Creates a new ManagementService.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    deleteMedia(MediaSyncPolling.Media media)
    Deletes the local copy of a media file.
    void
    downloadMedia(MediaSyncPolling.Media media, MediaSyncPolling.MediaSyncPolling msp, String token)
    Downloads a network media file to the local download directory.
    DefaultListModel<String>
    getUpdatedLocalListModel(String filterType)
    Returns a DefaultListModel populated with the names of locally filtered media files.
    void

    Opens the local copy of the given media with the system default application.
    void
    uploadMedia(File file, String youtubeUrl, MediaSyncPolling.MediaSyncPolling msp, String token)
    Uploads a local media file to the server.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • ManagementService

      public ManagementService(LibraryService lib, MediaService media, PreferencesService prefs)
      Creates a new ManagementService.
      Parameters:
      lib - service for scanning local files
      media - service for managing the combined local/network media list
      prefs - user preferences (reserved for future use)

  • Method Details

    • getUpdatedLocalListModel

      public DefaultListModel<String> getUpdatedLocalListModel(String filterType) throws IOException
      Returns a DefaultListModel populated with the names of locally filtered media files.
      Parameters:
      filterType - filter category: "All", "Videos", or "Audios"
      Returns:
      list model ready to bind to a JList
      Throws:
      IOException - if the local directory cannot be read

    • deleteMedia

      public boolean deleteMedia(MediaSyncPolling.Media media) throws Exception
      Deletes the local copy of a media file.
      Parameters:
      media - the media whose local file should be deleted
      Returns:
      true if deleted, false if the file did not exist
      Throws:
      Exception - if an I/O error occurs

    • downloadMedia

      public void downloadMedia(MediaSyncPolling.Media media, MediaSyncPolling.MediaSyncPolling msp, String token) throws Exception
      Downloads a network media file to the local download directory.
      Parameters:
      media - the media to download
      msp - sync polling component used to download
      token - authentication token
      Throws:
      Exception - if the file already exists locally or the download fails

    • uploadMedia

      public void uploadMedia(File file, String youtubeUrl, MediaSyncPolling.MediaSyncPolling msp, String token) throws Exception
      Uploads a local media file to the server. Only MP3, MP4, and M4A files are accepted.
      Parameters:
      file - local file to upload
      youtubeUrl - source URL associated with the file
      msp - sync polling component used to perform the upload
      token - authentication token
      Throws:
      Exception - if the file type is not allowed or the upload fails

    • openLocalFile

      public void openLocalFile(MediaSyncPolling.Media media) throws Exception
      Opens the local copy of the given media with the system default application.
      Parameters:
      media - the media to open
      Throws:
      Exception - if the file is not downloaded locally or the Desktop API is unavailable
